title: Slovakian Oyster Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful Slovakian soup featuring oysters and a hint of herbal notes. This dish is perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: In a large pot, sauté the kielbasa over medium heat until browned.
Add the chopped celery and cook until tender.
Add the oysters and cook until they begin to open.
Add the thyme and broth to the pot, then bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
